examples: The Roman Catholic Church has issued a compendium of its teachings.
He spent 27 years writing Compendium of Material Medica.
How long did Li Shizhen spend in writing Compendium of Materia Medical?
On Halloween, Radar Logic published a new compendium of housing for the year ending in August.
Will the UN try to bury this important finding in its upcoming (2013) climate compendium?
